summary: Comprehensive testing of HevaPOS Iteration 25 - THOROUGH testing of ALL pages on BOTH mobile (375px) and desktop (1366px) viewports. CRITICAL: Sidebar is now HIDDEN on mobile (CSS fix confirmed working). PDF download is WORKING. All major features verified across all screen sizes.

minor.issue: Rate limiting (10/min) can block rapid testing - security feature, not a bug

issues: Console warning: Chart width/height -1 - recharts container sizing issue (non-blocking, visual only)

critical_code_review_comments: SIDEBAR FIX CONFIRMED: .sidebar-wrapper class no longer has display:flex, relies on Tailwind hidden md:flex - sidebar is HIDDEN on mobile (375px) and VISIBLE on desktop (1366px)
PDF Download: WORKING - Uses fetch+blob approach via POST /api/reports/generate, downloads actual PDF file
Mobile Responsiveness: ALL pages tested at 375px width - Dashboard, POS, Reports, Settings, Tables, Orders, KDS, Menu Management, Audit Log - all responsive
Multi-tenancy: Categories and Products correctly filtered by restaurant_id server-side
QR Menu: Public access working at /menu/{restaurant_id}/{table_hash} - no auth required
Cash Drawer: Accessible by staff users (role='user') - not restricted to admin only
KDS: Back button present, 4 active tickets displayed with Acknowledge buttons
Settings: All 4 tabs working (Business Info, Stripe Payments, User Management, Security with Manager PIN)

success_rate.backend: 94% (17/22 passed, 4 skipped due to rate limiting, 1 minor endpoint path issue)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI tests passed on both mobile and desktop)

seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data - 11 products, 4 categories, 4 tables, 20+ orders
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 THOROUGH testing complete. CRITICAL CSS FIX VERIFIED: Sidebar is now HIDDEN on mobile (375px) for ALL pages. PDF download is WORKING. All pages tested on both mobile (375px) and desktop (1366px) viewports: Login, Dashboard, POS, Reports, Settings, Tables, Orders, KDS, QR Menu, Menu Management, Audit Log, Cash Drawer, Platform Dashboard, Restaurant Management. Multi-tenancy enforced server-side. Rate limiting is 10 requests/minute on login endpoint.
